message: What happened with the mother-daughter meeting, and what caused the missed shoot?
I thought it was urgent to meet her.
She left this morning and hasn't returned yet.
Where is she and what is she doing?
She silently invited me into the room and was lounging on the couch like usual.
Didn't I say I didn't want to see your face?
The room is tidy, just like when I visited before. There's no sign of Meryl letting her emotions spill out.
A strong smell of alcohol floats in the air.
It seems she didn't just drink from the one bottle on the table.
In front of the window overlooking Manhattan, a figure is lying down.
She’s looking at me with a mixed expression of indignation and contempt. Perhaps what dominates her is an indescribable sense of emptiness?
Her pale skin has reddened from alcohol, and a light sweat is visible. If not for her face, it would be enchanting.
It’s what it comes down to.
I can hardly stand to hold her gaze any longer.
I never wanted to see a face like yours again.
Did I hit a nerve or something?
Don't play dumb! I was humiliated because I fell for your trick.
Please don’t show up in front of me again.
Never show up in front of me again.
No one came. I was the only one standing there today on the closed day.
I hurried out and looked like a fool.
I thought Yuriko went to introduce her to her daughter.
I told you, that didn’t happen.
I stood in front of the Guggenheim Museum entrance from 11:30, the whole time.
In the end, I waited until 1 o'clock.
You carried me, didn’t you? That’s terrible.
You’re the worst kind of man!
Director Fabar said he would definitely come to the shoot today.
I don’t know anything about that.
The reason I’m not going to the shoot is all your fault. Make sure to explain that to Martin, okay? Hmph.
There’s no way I can shoot with these feelings.
Who could have predicted it would end up like this? Meryl's outrage is completely justified.
Caught up in a minute-by-minute schedule,
an hour and a half must be of tremendous value.
Surely knowing they could see their daughter is why they endured without throwing a fit.
I can't stand being alone with
. The only way to calm her anger is for me to disappear.
Are you saying Cindy stood me up today?
She was so looking forward to it, why?
What happened to Cindy? Did she just whimsically blow off our promise?
What happened to Yuriko, who was supposed to be with her?
Could it be that I’m just indulging Cindy’s whims and goofing around?
Anyway, let’s try to find Cindy. It’s still not too late to fix this.
said goodbye and left the room.
